title: mieweb.jsonc
description: Portability sidecar consumed by the @mieweb CLI. wrangler.jsonc remains the source of truth for bindings; this file only records the active target and non-Cloudflare adapter hints.

wrangler.description: Path to the canonical wrangler config the CLI reads bindings from and delegates to on Cloudflare.

target.description: Default deployment target when none is given via --target or MIEWEB_TARGET.

targets.description: Per-target adapter configuration. Only consulted for non-cloudflare targets.
